diagnostics.culprit_pair: array of two predictor ids sorted ascending
diagnostics.high_leverage_states: array of three state abbreviations in leverage order
diagnostics.sensitivity_p_bucket: enum: lt_0_001, lt_0_01, lt_0_05, ge_0_05, not_computed

model.adjusted_p_bucket: enum: lt_0_001, lt_0_01, lt_0_05, ge_0_05, not_computed
model.bivariate_p_bucket: enum: lt_0_001, lt_0_01, lt_0_05, ge_0_05, not_computed

sample.excluded_states: array of state abbreviations sorted ascending
sample.included_states: array of state abbreviations sorted ascending
sample.territories_excluded: array of territory abbreviations sorted ascending
